scripts.setup-tools: flatpak remote-add --user --if-not-exists flathub https://dl.flathub.org/repo/flathub.flatpakrepo && flatpak install --user -y flathub org.gnome.Sdk//49 org.gnome.Platform//49 org.flathub.flatpak-external-data-checker org.flatpak.Builder
scripts.update-deps: cd io.github.pwr_solaar.solaar && python3 ../flatpak-builder-tools/pip/flatpak-pip-generator.py --runtime='org.gnome.Sdk//49' "evdev>=1.1.2" "pyudev>=0.13" "PyYAML>=3.12" "python-xlib>=0.27" "psutil>=5.4.3" PyGObject typing_extensions --yaml --output python3-modules
scripts.build-install: cd io.github.pwr_solaar.solaar && flatpak run org.flatpak.Builder --install --force-clean build --user io.github.pwr_solaar.solaar.yaml
